profile.name: FluxA
profile.bio:
Extensible Payment Primitives for the era of AI.
Catalyze the adoption of x402/AP2.

https://t.co/X8IrFB4vIS

tweets.text:
Embedded & deferred payments reshape how agents transact.

They turn payment from a separate financial step into an embedded capability within agent communication.

#x402 inspired a movement — more financial innovation is coming.

Claude Cowork is built on Claude Code+Skills. Works great for non-technical tasks.

Then we embedded APIs into the Skills.

Now it's something else entirely.

🔽Creating a PPT with Claude Code: Vanilla vs Skills vs Skills+API

Introducing Cowork: Claude Code for the rest of your work.

Cowork lets you complete non-technical tasks much like how developers use Claude Code.

AI agents are becoming proactive.
But proactivity without payment is just intention.

At FluxA, we believe agent payment is what turns reasoning into execution — and expands the real capability boundary of agents.

FluxA doesn't treat payment as a transaction step.
We embed…

Introducing FluxA Mandate: A risk-control–enhanced AP2 payment mandate service 

> Tell the agent your payment task
> The agent signs an intent mandate with you
> FluxA Mandate enforces secure execution
> Mitigates hallucinations and injection attacks...

Built on top of the…

You built the tools, agents are using them. Value is flowing... just not to you. Gain your value in a few minutes.

Introducing FluxA Monetization. Turn any MCP and API server into a revenue stream. Paste your server URL, set prices per tool. Agents pays via x402.

Happy to join the @CoinbaseDev official x402 ecosystem page! 

Making x402 agent payments more secure and seamless, smooth like Flux, is the goal we continue to build toward.

Find FluxA on x402.org

x402 v2 is live. Can't wait to unlock the new features FluxA will build on top of it

> deferred payments
> fund splitting, cash back
> fiat rails

I wasn't suppose to share this, but we just monetized MCP servers on n8n with x402. 

No code, no api keys.

Just agent using better tools with some fees and go brrrrrr

Tools for agent is going evolve, very soon.

Budget-controlled X402 access is now live on Qwen Code @Alibaba_Qwen 🧑‍💻

Your code agents can now tap into powerful X402 resources to upgrade the vibecoding experience.

FluxA Agent Wallet gives you full budget control for your code agents, enabling more imaginative task…

Introducing FluxA AI Wallet — Agent spending, under control

✔️ Grant and revoke wallet access per agent
✔️ Per-agent spending limits
✔️ Per-x402 server payment policies
✔️ Pay via MCP, APIs, and more
✔️ Unlock more AI agents: ChatGPT, N8N, AgentKit

Building on x402 @CoinbaseDev…

scraped_pages.content_summary: WARNING: This appears to be a DIFFERENT PROJECT - Fluxa Swap is a BSC-based cross-chain DEX with $FLUX token. NOT the same as @fluxA_offical which is building AI payment infrastructure. The Twitter bio link may be incorrect or there's brand confusion.

key_info.product: Fluxa Swap - cross-chain token swap DEX

scraped_pages.content_summary: Comprehensive thesis on AI agent payments - 'Embedded Payments 2.0'. Discusses how AI agents are becoming economic participants that need payment capabilities. Positions FluxA as building infrastructure for AI to discover, pay for, and access internet resources. References x402 (Coinbase), AP2 (Google), and ACP (ChatGPT+Stripe) protocols.

key_info.vision: Building 'Embedded Payments 2.0' infrastructure for AI agents
key_info.thesis: AI will become internet's new economic protagonist - needs native payment rails
key_info.market_positioning: Building on top of x402 protocol (Coinbase), integrating with AP2 standards

scraped_pages.content_summary: FluxA Monetization product - allows MCP server and API developers to monetize their services using x402 protocol. AI agents pay per request using HTTP 402 Payment Required.

key_info.value_prop: Turn MCP servers and APIs into revenue streams
key_info.tech: x402 protocol, non-custodial wallets, Privy authentication

scraped_pages.content_summary: Official x402 protocol page - open standard for internet-native payments using HTTP 402. FluxA is listed on the official ecosystem page.

key_info.fluxa_relationship: Listed on official x402 ecosystem page

scraped_pages.content_summary: FluxA Agent Wallet - allows users to let AI agents pay safely with spending controls.
